questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.hint: You will need to regroup (borrow) from the thousands place to subtract.
questions.explanation: Regroup 6,000 to 5,900 and 10 tens. 0-0=0. 10-5=5. 9-4=5. 5-3=2. The difference is 2,550.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.hint: Multiply 45 by 10, then 45 by 5, and add the two totals together.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.hint: Use long division. How many times does 8 go into 20?
questions.explanation: 8 goes into 20 two times (16), leaving 4. Bring down 5 to make 45. 8 goes into 45 five times (40), leaving 5. Bring down 6 to make 56. 8 goes into 56 seven times. The quotient is 257.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.q: A school has 300 students going on a field trip. If each bus can hold 50 students, how many buses are needed?
questions.hint: Divide the total number of students by the number of students one bus can hold.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.q: A baker makes 4 batches of cookies. Each batch has 12 cookies. If he sells 30 cookies, how many does he have left?
questions.hint: First, find the total number of cookies made. Then subtract the amount sold.
questions.explanation: Total cookies = 4 × 12 = 48 cookies. 48 cookies - 30 sold = 18 cookies left.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.q: Compare the fractions 5/8 and 3/8. Which statement is true?
questions.hint: When the bottom numbers (denominators) are the same, look at the top numbers.
questions.explanation: Because the denominators are the same, you can just compare numerators. 5 is greater than 3, so 5/8 is larger.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.q: Subtract 8/10 - 5/10. Write your answer as a fraction (e.g., a/b).
questions.hint: Keep the denominator exactly the same and subtract the numerators.
questions.explanation: The denominator stays 10. Subtract the numerators: 8 - 5 = 3. The fraction is 3/10.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.q: An angle measuring exactly 120 degrees is called what kind of angle?
questions.hint: It is larger than a right angle (90 degrees) but smaller than a straight line.
questions.explanation: An obtuse angle is an angle that measures more than 90 degrees but less than 180 degrees.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.q: What is the area of a rectangular field that has a length of 15 meters and a width of 8 meters?
questions.hint: Area of a rectangle is found by multiplying its length by its width.
questions.explanation: Area = length × width. 15 m × 8 m = 120 square meters.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.hint: A quarter of an hour is 15 minutes.
questions.explanation: One hour is 60 minutes. A quarter of 60 is 15. So a quarter past 4 means 15 minutes after 4:00, which is 4:15.
